description_long: This potted plant features broad, elongated blue-green leaves radiating outward from a central stem, creating a lush and tropical appearance. The leaves have a slightly glossy finish and are arranged in a rosette pattern, with some curling gently at the edges. Emerging from the center is a reddish-pink stem that supports several spherical, pale purple berries or buds, adding a whimsical accent to the plant. The plant appears to be rooted in a simple, unadorned base, with no visible pot or container details. The overall design is stylized, with exaggerated leaf shapes and vibrant, contrasting colors. This plant would serve as a striking decorative element in urban parks, modern plazas, or contemporary indoor spaces.
description: A stylized potted plant with broad blue-green leaves and a central reddish stem topped with pale purple berries, creating a lush and whimsical look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full rosette of blue-green leaves and the central reddish stem with two visible purple berries at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the horizontal spread of the leaves and reveals additional plant components, including a separate berry stem and tufts of grass.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the leaf cluster and a clearer view of the reddish stem with three purple berries, emphasizing the plant's layered structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the leaf spread and the separate plant elements, with the central stem and berries partially visible.
